name: Dryad

traits.name: Immunities
traits.text: Poison; Exhaustion, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned, Unconscious

traits.name: Earth Glide
traits.text: The elemental can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the elemental doesn’t disturb the material it moves through.

traits.name: Siege Monster
traits.text: The elemental deals double damage to objects and structures.

text:
# Dryad

*Large Elemental, Neutral*

### Actions

**Slam.** Melee Attack Roll: +8, reach 10 ft. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) Bludgeoning damage.

**Rock Launch.** Ranged Attack Roll: +8, range 60 ft. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.
